communications.subject: Illinois Freedom of Information Act. Request: Non-Implementation Forms, Special Education
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

1. Any documents, data or reports that have a detailed accounting of the total number of Parent/Guardian Notification IEP Services Not Implemented Within Ten School Days for the 2025/2026 (to date) academic year broken down by school. Please provide records and/or data that shows the number of non-implementation forms entered into by month, along with a racial breakdown of students.

2. Any documents, data or reports that have a detailed accounting of the total number of Break in Service forms for the 2025/2026 (to date) academic year broken down by school. Please provide records and/or data that shows the number of Break In Service forms entered into by month, along with a racial breakdown of students.

This request is made on behalf of The FOIA Bakery. Because this request is in the public interest for Illinois nonprofit The FOIA Bakery’s work to advocate for public education, please waive any fees in accordance with 5 ILCS § 140/6(c). Feel free to contact me with any questions, or if clarification is needed.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Miriam Bhimani

communications.subject: Illinois Freedom of Information Act. Request: Compensatory Education, Reimbursements
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

When compensatory education is awarded to students, families might need to use outside vendors. Provide records sufficient to show the following:

1. In school year 2025-2026, approved vendors for providing compensatory education services to chicago public school students

2. In school year 2025-2026, all vendor invoices related to compensatory education awards

3. In school year 2025-2026, any blank reimbursement forms that are provided to individuals who have been awarded compensatory education.

4. In school year 2025-2026, any instructions given to guardians and parents related to filing for reimbursements for compensatory education services. 

This request is made on behalf of The FOIA Bakery. Because this request is in the public interest for Illinois nonprofit The FOIA Bakery’s work to advocate for public education, please waive any fees in accordance with 5 ILCS § 140/6(c). Feel free to contact me with any questions, or if clarification is needed.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Miriam Bhimani

communications.subject: Illinois Freedom of Information Act. Request: Type of Compesnatory Education
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

In SSM, there is a form entitled "Compensatory Education Form". It is referenced in FOIA release 18971 (attached). 

Records sufficient to show the following:

1. In school year 2025-2026, compensatory education awarded broken down by type:

extended school year
before or after school tutoring
after school programs
additional related service minutes for a specified period of time
other

2. In school year 2025-2026, compensatory education confirmation broken down by type, including the date of confirmation:

ESY service completion
Before or After school completion
After School service completion
RSP service completion
Other service completion

3. In school year 2025-2026, compensatory education eligibility based on transportation (yes/no).

This request is made on behalf of The FOIA Bakery. Because this request is in the public interest for Illinois nonprofit The FOIA Bakery’s work to advocate for public education, please waive any fees in accordance with 5 ILCS § 140/6(c). Feel free to contact me with any questions, or if clarification is needed.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Miriam Bhimani

communications.subject: Illinois Freedom of Information Act. Request: Compensatory Education Report
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

In FOIA #18985, the released documents reference "This report represents out standardized internal report for issued compensatory education documents." 

Records sufficient to show:

1. The standardized internal report for issued compensatory education documents for school year 2025-2026 districtwide.

I am not looking for student information, please redact student specific information. Whether a student received a compensatory education award or not is not identifiable information. This request is made on behalf of The FOIA Bakery. Because this request is in the public interest for Illinois nonprofit The FOIA Bakery’s work to advocate for public education, please waive any fees in accordance with 5 ILCS § 140/6(c). Feel free to contact me with any questions, or if clarification is needed.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Miriam Bhimani

title: Chester County Commissioners and County of Chester dba Board of Commissioners Records Request
tags: county of chester dba board of commissioners

communications.subject: Pennsylvania Right to Know Act Request: Chester County Commissioners and County of Chester dba Board of Commissioners Records Request

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Please provide an electronic copy (.pdf) of the Jacobs Engineering Group proposal for Olympics-related planning. This firm was awarded a contract in May 2026 for "Consultant Selection for the Los Angeles 2028 Olympics Transportation Service Plan and Capital Needs Assessment".

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Carbon Copy
